name: Berachain STONE
redeem: beraSTONE is the LP/share token for StakeStone's Berachain Vault. The vault contract exposes request/claim redemption functions and uses STONE as the withdraw token; the app also shows secondary-market swap and STONE-to-ETH redemption options. A fixed redemption delay was not found.
notes: Vault was created for Berachain/Boyco exposure and incentives; app shows Royco allocation and deposits currently paused. More complex and campaign-dependent than plain STONE.
